member.summary: A repository builder for a Postgres connector.

member.summary: The details for registering an assembly.

member.summary: The connection string to the database server/

member.summary: The name of the database.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Connector.Postgres.PostgresMeshRepositoryBuilder.UserProfile
member.summary: The profile of the user connecting to the database.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Connector.Postgres.PostgresMeshRepositoryBuilder.CreateRepository``1(System.String,System.String,HularionMesh.User.UserProfile)
member.summary: Creates a MeshRepository using a Postgres store with a standard setup.
member.typeparam: The type of attribute that will cause a class to be added as a domain if that class has the attribute.
member.param: The profile of the user creating the repository.

member.param: The profile of the user creating the repository.

member.summary: Creates the repository using the values set in this.

member.summary: The mesh services provider for communicating with Postgres.

member.summary: Constructor.
member.param: The connection details for connecting to a postgres server.

member.name: T:HularionMesh.Connector.Postgres.PostgresRepository
member.summary: A repository that connects to a Postgres database.

member.summary: Provides an ISqlType given the mesh data type.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Connector.Postgres.PostgresRepository.SqlTypesProvider
member.summary: Provides all the database system types.

member.summary: Creates domain object keys given the provided domain.

member.summary: Provides the link form specification for linked domains.

member.summary: Creates a language-specific name given the SqlObject.

member.summary: The string containing the connection details to connect to a Postgres database.

member.summary: Constructor.
member.param: The string containing the connection details to connect to a Postgres database.

member.summary: Creates the table using the provided table specification.
member.param: The specification to create the table.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Connector.Postgres.PostgresRepository.AddTableColumns(System.String,HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.ORM.CreateColumnSpecification[])
member.summary: Adds the table columns to the table with name tableName.
member.param: The name of the table to add the columns.
The columns to add to the table.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Connector.Postgres.PostgresRepository.ExecuteCommand(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.ORM.SqlMeshParameter})
member.summary: Executes the provided command.
member.param: The parameters to use in the command.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Connector.Postgres.PostgresRepository.ExecuteQuery(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.ORM.SqlMeshParameter})
member.summary: Executes the query using the provided parameters and returns a DataTable with the result.
member.param: The query to retrieve the values.
member.returns: A DataTable with the result of the query.

member.name: T:HularionMesh.Connector.Postgres.SqlType
member.summary: Contains the details for translating sql types to and from mesh data types.

member.summary: The type of the Mesh DataType to which this is related.

member.summary: The names of the SQL types.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Connector.Postgres.SqlType.SqlPrimaryKeyTypeNames
member.summary: The names of the SQL types if it is a primary key.

member.summary: Converts the SQL values to a C# typed value.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Connector.Postgres.SqlType.ToSqlTransform
member.summary: Converts a C# typed value to the SQL values.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Connector.Postgres.SqlType.SqlTypeCount
member.summary: The number of SQL types to which the mesh type maps.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Connector.Postgres.SqlType.SqlTypeProvider
member.summary: Provides the ISqlType that corresponds to the provided mesh data type.
